controls.name: Access Control
controls.objective: Ensure system access is restricted to authorized users through authentication, authorization, and session management

evidence_types.label: Authentication Configuration
evidence_types.description: Configuration files defining authentication mechanisms such as OAuth, SSO, or MFA settings

evidence_types.label: RBAC Policy Definition
evidence_types.description: Role-based access control definitions specifying roles, permissions, and access levels

evidence_types.label: Session Management Configuration
evidence_types.description: Configuration or code governing session lifecycle including timeout, renewal, and invalidation

controls.name: Change Management
controls.objective: Ensure all changes to production systems follow approved processes with rollback capability

evidence_types.label: Change Approval Record
evidence_types.description: Documentation or configuration enforcing change approval workflows before production deployment

evidence_types.label: Deployment Configuration
evidence_types.description: CI/CD pipeline definitions, deployment scripts, or infrastructure-as-code governing production releases

evidence_types.label: Rollback Procedure
evidence_types.description: Documented procedures or automated scripts enabling rollback of failed production changes

controls.name: Data Quality
controls.objective: Ensure data inputs are validated and transformations preserve integrity

evidence_types.label: Input Validation Rule
evidence_types.description: Schema definitions, validation logic, or constraint configurations that enforce data input quality

evidence_types.label: Data Transformation Test
evidence_types.description: Test cases verifying that data transformations produce correct and complete output

controls.name: Incident Handling
controls.objective: Ensure security incidents are detected, responded to, and reviewed

evidence_types.label: Monitoring Configuration
evidence_types.description: Alert rules, log aggregation settings, or monitoring dashboards that detect anomalies and incidents

evidence_types.label: Incident Response Plan
evidence_types.description: Documented procedures for responding to security incidents including escalation paths and communication protocols

evidence_types.label: Postmortem Record
evidence_types.description: Post-incident review documents capturing root cause analysis, lessons learned, and corrective actions
